name: Rhodes Butler
description:
Record Store Worker Loner x AnyPOV User


ＣＯＮＴＥＸＴ：
Here's another one that's almost entirely up to you! The intro opens up with Rhodes and his best friend/manager discussing music when the bell above the door goes off. I found this gen just gathering dust in the album where I keep unused gens and I was like... What?! He's gorgeous. And I needed to make him a moody, melancholy loner. Maybe a little bit (tad bit, just a teeny tiny bit) of a music elitist because. I mean. Look at him? Total elitist.

ＲＯＬＥＰＬＡＹ ＩＤＥＡＳ：

❀ You're new in town! Yay!

❀ You come in and hate on the music playing (oh no, you might piss him off)

❀ Idk be crazy with it, are you an ex from way back when? Back to tell him he has a kid he's never met? He might cry

ＣＲＥＡＴＯＲ ＮＯＴＥＳ：

Yall the love that you guys have sent me on Darcy has been insane (˃̣̣̥ᯅ˂̣̣̥) I was so nervous to come back after disappearing for so long, but seeing how much you guys have enjoyed my bots makes me so incredibly happy. YOU'RE ALL AMAZING. I have a fem version of Darcy coming out soon, along with Bianca (I haven't forgotten) and a few other bots already planned, so I hope you guys enjoy them! ALSO, if anyone has specific scenarios in mind, feel free to let me know!

Note: If anyone needs an ST card, don't be shy about reaching out to me! The link below doesn't work for everyone so you're always welcome to message me on discord. If I don't get back to you immediately, I will asap ♡

ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
